decisions.decision: Stable supported Neo4j operations plus semantic MDM-to-graph parity define health.
decisions.rationale: This directly proves projection correctness and traversal without coupling health to an experimental inventory endpoint.

decisions.decision: The platform-owned generation registry defines graph discovery and lifecycle state.
decisions.rationale: It is governed, queryable, and independent of experimental Native App behavior.
